meaning: adj.外科的,外科医生的,手术上的n.外科病房,外科手术
examples: A biopsy is usually a minor surgical procedure.
The delicate surgical operation took five hours.
Surgical techniques are constantly being refined.
Dr. Ferlic proposed a surgical intervention that reflects precisely the high-tech ethos of contemporary American medicine.
Devon's four main hospital trusts each made at least two serious surgical errors this year.
